name: Stemtech Corp
business: Stemtech sells patented stem cell dietary supplements, OraStem toothpaste, Cellect One Rapid Renew Stem Cell Peptide Night Cream, Cellect One Shield HOCL skin care mist, and StemPets pet supplements. The products are sold through Independent Business Partners (IBPs) and direct-to-consumer network marketing.

exposures.sentence: Stemtech has pioneered and patented a whole new category of stem cell dietary supplements.

catalysts.sentence: Stemtech announced it will introduce StemPets , a pet supplement like our RCM for humans to our furry family members in April 2025.

catalysts.event: Introduction of Cellect One Shield skin care mist
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we introduced Cellect One Shield: HOCL (Hypochlorous Acid) skin care mist, which supports healthier skin, kills germs as a disinfectant, supports wound care and odor elimination.

catalysts.event: Secured financing for $2.5 million inventory production
catalysts.sentence: In April 2026, the Company secured financing to support the production of approximately $2.5 million of inventory intended to improve product availability and support anticipated customer demand.

tamClaims.claim: Global pet industry market size is $303 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: The global pet industry is a $303 Billion market.
